data.en: I played badminton last weekend.
data.cn: 我上周末打了羽毛球。
data.hint: Past activity with 'played' / 使用played描述过去活动

data.en: I visited a science museum.
data.cn: 我参观了一家科学博物馆。
data.hint: Past tense of 'visit' / visit的过去式

data.en: How was Peter's weekend?
data.cn: 彼得的周末过得怎么样？
data.hint: Past state question / 询问过去状态

data.en: What did Peter like about the museum?
data.cn: 彼得喜欢博物馆里的什么？
data.hint: Wh- question in past tense / 过去时的特殊疑问句

data.en: Peter visited the science museum.
data.cn: 彼得参观了科学博物馆。
data.hint: Subject-Verb-Object in past / 过去时的动宾结构

data.en: He learnt how astronauts live and work.
data.cn: 他了解了宇航员是如何生活和工作的。
data.hint: British English 'learnt' / 英式拼写learnt

data.en: Teng Fei gave the tourists the wrong directions.
data.cn: 腾飞给游客指错了方向。
data.hint: Irregular past 'gave' / 不规则过去式gave

data.en: He left his book on the bus.
data.cn: 他把书忘在公共汽车上了。
data.hint: Irregular past 'left' / 不规则过去式left

data.en: How was Teng Fei's weekend?
data.cn: 腾飞的周末过得怎么样？
data.hint: Past 'be' verb question / be动词过去时的疑问句

data.en: It was terrible because I got on the wrong bus.
data.cn: 太糟糕了，因为我上了错车。
data.hint: Reason with 'because' / 使用because引导原因
accept: Because I got on the wrong bus it was terrible.

data.en: How was your school trip to the wastewater plant?
data.cn: 你去污水处理厂的学校旅行怎么样？
data.hint: School trip experience / 学校旅行体验

data.en: No, it wasn't boring at all.
data.cn: 不，它一点也不无聊。
data.hint: not... at all structure / 根本不...结构

data.en: It was really interesting!
data.cn: 它真的很有趣！
data.hint: Adverb + Adjective / 副词+形容词

data.en: We saw the plant make dirty water clean again.
data.cn: 我们看到工厂把脏水再次变干净。
data.hint: make + object + adj. / make+宾语+形容词

data.en: Dirty water from our homes goes into the plant.
data.cn: 我们家里的脏水流入工厂。
data.hint: Present tense for facts / 描述事实用现在时

data.en: Special screens remove large pieces of waste from the water.
data.cn: 特殊的过滤网清除了水中大块的废物。
data.hint: remove... from... / 从...中移除...

data.en: Large machines remove germs and other things from the water.
data.cn: 大型机器清除水中的细菌和其他物质。
data.hint: Plural nouns machines and germs / 名词复数形式

data.en: These things are usually too small to see.
data.cn: 这些东西通常太小而看不见。
data.hint: too... to... structure / 太...而不能...

data.en: I used to think it was easy to get clean water.
data.cn: 我过去认为获得干净的水很容易。
data.hint: used to structure / 过去常常...

data.en: I didn't realize it was so hard.
data.cn: 我以前没意识到这这么难。
data.hint: British English 'realise' / 英式拼写realize

data.en: Did you see anything interesting at the science museum yesterday?
data.cn: 你昨天在科学博物馆看到什么有趣的东西了吗？
data.hint: Past tense question / 过去时的疑问句

data.en: There was a space exhibition and there were robots.
data.cn: 有一个太空展览，还有机器人。
data.hint: There be in past tense / There be句型的过去式
accept: There were robots and there was a space exhibition.

data.en: Did Teng Fei give the tourists the right directions last weekend?
data.cn: 腾飞上周末给游客指对了方向吗？
data.hint: Did + Verb Base / Did + 动词原形

data.en: No, he didn't and he felt bad about that.
data.cn: 不，他没有，他对此感到很抱歉。
data.hint: Negative response and feeling / 否定回答与感受
accept: No he didn't and he felt bad about that.

data.en: What did you do the day before yesterday?
data.cn: 前天你做了什么？
data.hint: Time expression 'the day before yesterday' / 时间短语'前天'

data.en: I saw my favourite actor in a film the day before yesterday.
data.cn: 我前天在电影里看到了我最喜欢的演员。
data.hint: British English 'favourite' / 英式拼写favourite
accept: The day before yesterday I saw my favourite actor in a film.

data.en: They spent a day on a chicken farm last month.
data.cn: 他们上个月在养鸡场度过了一天。
data.hint: Irregular past 'spent' / 不规则过去式spent

data.en: There were two bottles of milk on the table a few minutes ago.
data.cn: 几分钟前桌上有两瓶牛奶。
data.hint: Time expression 'a few minutes ago' / 时间短语'几分钟前'

data.en: Ms Li met one of her friends in the street last Wednesday.
data.cn: 李女士上周三在街上遇到了她的一个朋友。
data.hint: one of + plural noun / ...之一+名词复数

data.en: The doctor stopped work at ten o'clock last night.
data.cn: 医生昨晚十点停止了工作。
data.hint: Past tense of 'stop' / stop的过去式

data.en: Today we went on a school trip to a farm!
data.cn: 今天我们去农场进行学校旅行了！
data.hint: go on a trip / 去旅行

data.en: It was tiring but great fun!
data.cn: 虽然很累，但很有趣！
data.hint: Contrast with 'but' / 使用but表示转折

data.en: There were large tents with many fruits and vegetables.
data.cn: 有许多装满水果和蔬菜的大帐篷。
data.hint: Plural 'tents' and 'fruits' / 名词复数形式

data.en: The farmer told us how food goes to our tables.
data.cn: 农夫告诉我们食物是如何上桌的。
data.hint: how... goes to... / 如何传送到...

data.en: First, we picked some strawberries.
data.cn: 首先，我们摘了一些草莓。
data.hint: First as a sequence marker / sequence marker First

data.en: The farmer taught us how to cut branches and leaves.
data.cn: 农夫教我们如何修剪树枝和叶子。
data.hint: Irregular past 'taught' / 不规则过去式taught

data.en: This helps the plants to grow more fruit.
data.cn: 这有助于植物长出更多的果实。
data.hint: Present tense for purpose / 描述目的或结果用现在时

data.en: Farming isn't easy and plants need so much work!
data.cn: 务农不容易，植物需要很多照料！
data.hint: Gerund subject 'Farming' / 动名词作主语

data.en: Every grain comes from hard work.
data.cn: 粒粒皆辛苦。
data.hint: Every + singular noun / Every+名词单数

data.en: The food certainly tastes better when you work for it!
data.cn: 当你为食物劳动时，它们的味道肯定更好！
data.hint: tastes better / 味道更好

data.en: There was a total solar eclipse in Wuhan today.
data.cn: 今天武汉出现了日全食。
data.hint: There be past tense / There be句型过去式

data.en: I woke up early because I couldn't wait to see it!
data.cn: 我早早醒来，因为我迫不及待想看到它！
data.hint: couldn't wait to / 迫不及待做某事

data.en: My friends and I went down to the Yangtze River.
data.cn: 我和朋友们去了扬子江（长江）。
data.hint: Subject 'My friends and I' / 主语'我和我的朋友们'

data.en: We took cameras, chairs, food and special glasses.
data.cn: 我们带了相机、椅子、食物和特制眼镜。
data.hint: Items in a list / 列表中的物品

data.en: The moon slowly moved in front of the sun.
data.cn: 月亮慢慢地移到太阳前面。
data.hint: in front of / 在...前面
accept: The moon moved slowly in front of the sun.

data.en: It looked like someone bit a hole in the sun!
data.cn: 它看起来就像有人在太阳上咬了一个洞！
data.hint: looked like / 看起来像

data.en: The sky went dark at nine twenty-six a.m.
data.cn: 上午九点二十六分，天空变暗了。
data.hint: Past tense of go (become) / go的过去式表示变得

data.en: The total solar eclipse lasted for over five minutes.
data.cn: 日全食持续了五分钟以上。
data.hint: lasted for + time / 持续了+时间

data.en: I want to become an astronaut or astronomer someday.
data.cn: 我想有一天成为一名宇航员或天文学家。
data.hint: want to become / 想成为
accept: Someday I want to become an astronaut or astronomer.

data.en: The sky is the limit!
data.cn: 前程无量！（天空是极限！）
data.hint: Common idiom / 常用习语
